shorts.title_distilled: ​‘The Office US’ cast: Where the Dunder Mifflin folks are now​.
shorts.description: Over ten years since the last episode, ‘The Office US’ is still one of the all-time favorites. This mockumentary about the oddball staff at Dunder Mifflin in Scranton, Pennsylvania, first hit screens in 2005 and stuck around for nine seasons, wrapping up in 2…

shorts.description: ARCHBALD, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — On Wednesday, a borough council meeting took an unexpected turn as members of the council were voted out of their positions for their handling of data center proposals. Three members of Archbald council, council president Dave Moran, vice president Richard Guman, and president pro-tempore Marie Andreoli, were ousted after months [...]

shorts.title: Tractor trailer crash on I-81 causes heavy traffic
shorts.title_distilled: Tractor trailer crash on I-81 causes heavy traffic.
shorts.description: (WBRE/WYOU) — A tractor-trailer rolled over on I-81 northbound is causing heavy traffic Wednesday morning. The crash occurred around 6:00 a.m. on Interstate 81 northbound 1.2 miles south of Exit 190: Dickson City/Main Ave. The incident has caused a lane closure, resulting in traffic congestion. 511PA believes crews should have the scene cleared around 10:00 [...]
